knife.translate: нож, скальпель, резец, ножевой, резать ножом
mnemonic: knife [найф] нож - (Найф-ные‘) люди нож в спину получают (‘Наивные).

examples.eng: This knife cuts well.
The knife does not cut.
Give me the knife once.
Put an edge on this knife.
He had a knife in his right hand.
examples.ru: В правой руке у него был нож.

examples.eng: He trifled with his knife.
a knife with a horn handle
Jane cut the cord with a knife.
Remove the knife from the child!
He was holding a knife in one hand.
He held a knife to her throat.
examples.ru: Он держал нож у ее горла.

examples.eng: He set down his knife and fork.
She had been knifed to death.
He took a knife from his pocket.
A boy traded his knife for a pup.
He knocked the knife from my hand.
examples.ru: Он выбил нож из моей руки.

examples.eng: She cut into the melon with a knife.
Suddenly, he came at me with a knife.
examples.ru: Внезапно он набросился на меня с ножом.

examples.eng: Make sure you use a good sharp knife.
examples.ru: Убедитесь, что вы используете хороший острый нож.

examples.eng: He prodded at the meat with his knife.
examples.ru: Он ткнул ножом в кусок мяса.

examples.eng: The knife was dulled from use.
wrest the knife from his hands
She jabbed at him with a knife.
He lunged at me with his knife.
examples.ru: Он бросился на меня с ножом.

examples.eng: The victim was knifed to death.
He raised his knife for the kill.
examples.ru: Он поднял нож, чтобы прикончить добычу.

examples.eng: Chop the onions with a sharp knife.
a knife with a carved wooden handle
He made a lunge at me with his knife.
examples.ru: Он сделал выпад ножом в мою сторону.

examples.eng: The knife slipped and cut his finger.
examples.ru: Нож выскользнул из его руки, порезав палец.
